description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading from a main road to a detached garage and the main house. The house features a prominent gable roof and a front porch with visible support columns, facing a water body. The exterior walls are a mix of neutral tones, with the roof in a dark color and the porch area highlighted in a warm, wood-like hue. Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The property includes a paved driveway, a detached garage, and a lawn area, all bordered by a road on one side and water on the other. The overall design is simple yet functional, typical of suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and symmetrical windows, set on a plot bordered by a road and water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, and symmetrical windows facing the water.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the length of the house parallel to the road.
description_view_2: Rear view with the porch and main entrance facing the viewer, and the water body in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the house's side elevation adjacent to the road.
